step_rationale: ER-stress chaperone; endothelial activation; cell-adhesion processes.
mechanism: HSPA5 (GRP78) is induced by ischemic stress and regulates endothelial cell adhesion and survival, contributing to endothelial dysfunction and thrombotic risk.

references.title: Serum proteomic analysis reveals the cardioprotective effects of Shexiang Baoxin Pill and Suxiao Jiuxin Pill in a rat model of acute myocardial infarction.
